text: Hi, my name is Meghan, and I'm with AutoCare. Say for what we're seeing in your area, you may be overpaying for your auto insurance, and we want to help you find a better rate. Just to make sure we're finding you the right quote. May I ask, are you under the age of 80? Uh, about 10 years. But the spring of 1898 was the intent that you sprouted at the end of the year.
